blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,341 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 48".
